armHoverInfo: An important stat tied to all upper-body attack skills.
footHoverInfo: Affects running acceleration and is an important stat for lower-body attack skills.
coreHoverInfo: Core strength is the body's power center and stabilizer. Most attack moves are tied to this stat.
willHoverInfo: Willpower reflects a person's mental state. If it drops too low, she will break down and resign, causing a Game Over. Willpower can only be restored through special training.
hpHoverInfo: An important stat that affects current health. If it reaches zero, she will fall unconscious. Resting and eating meals can restore HP.
energyHoverInfo: Stamina affects the maximum energy in battle, and most official duties consume stamina. Resting and eating meals can restore stamina.
coinHoverInfo: Money that everyone loves. It can solve most people's problems.
expHoverInfo: Combat EXP can be used to learn secret techniques, or you can earn money by teaching your experience to others.
scoreHoverInfo: Raise your assessment score as much as possible within 30 days. If it falls below 30, you may risk dismissal from the police force.
safeHoverInfo: Public safety in Kurakucho Central Park, the area you are responsible for. The maximum is 100. Patrol often and handle cases to raise it.
skilldec_1: A basic straight punch. Fast, direct, and powerful. A fundamental opener against provocateurs and drunk offenders.
skilldec_2: Sweep-kicks the outside of the enemy's thigh with the shin, breaking their balance. Repeated use may leave them unsteady.
skilldec_3: A close-range elbow strike followed by a turning palm snap. Counters close threats and works especially well against thugs and gang enemies.
skilldec_4: A throwing technique combining a trip and body twist to slam the enemy to the ground. Deals extra damage to large enemies.
skilldec_5: Regain some energy by controlling your breathing. If energy is full, Breath reduces other combat skill cooldowns by 5 seconds.
skilldec_6: Leap up and drive a high-speed knee into the opponent's chest, leaving them short of breath for a short time.
skilldec_7: Pin the enemy to the ground while mounted, causing joint damage.
skilldec_8: Spin and leap into an elbow strike to the enemy's jaw, combining impact with a launch effect.
skilldec_9: A combo unleashed at the limit: dodge -> sweep kick -> elbow strike -> takedown.
skilldec_10: Enter a clear-mind state, greatly restoring energy while sharply reducing the cooldown of other skills.

810_desc3: On Monday, August 12, Reiwa 6, a fatal assault occurred in Kobe City. During an intense conflict with another person, the suspect lost emotional control and used excessive violence, resulting in the victim's death. After the incident, the suspect fled the scene and his current whereabouts are unknown.
810_desc4: A resident previously reported seeing someone resembling the suspect on a street in Nagoya City, but police dispatched to the scene could not confirm his whereabouts. The suspect is emotionally unstable and highly dangerous.
807_desc3: The suspect is an executive-level leader in the major Kansai violent organization "Koiryu-kai," and has long participated in and led multiple gang conflicts and violent injury cases. Although he was active in the Yokohama area in recent years, recent intelligence indicates he has left Kanto and may have returned to Kansai.
807_desc4: Witnesses report seeing someone resembling the suspect in busy districts of Osaka City, and other leads suggest he may have stayed briefly in Hyogo Prefecture. The suspect has extremely strong close-quarters combat ability, acts calmly and decisively, and often attacks first in conflicts. He is highly dangerous. Do not approach on your own. If you find any related leads, contact police immediately.
808_desc3: The suspect is a member of the Kansai violent organization "Koiryu-kai," and has long participated in multiple gang conflicts and violent injury cases. Recent investigations also suggest involvement in cross-regional smuggling, with ties to several illegal goods distribution cases. The suspect acts cautiously and has some combat ability, though his exact strength is unknown. In conflicts, he usually participates as an operative.
808_desc4: Intelligence indicates that he has recently been active around Osaka and Hyogo, possibly providing communications and supply support for the organization. Stay highly alert. Do not approach on your own. If you find any related leads, contact police immediately.
bounty_title8102:
To help solve the Kobe fatal assault case as soon as possible,
an additional reward has been established for anyone providing valid leads.
bounty_title8072:
To help solve cases involving the Koiryu-kai violent organization and multiple assault incidents,
a special additional reward has been established for anyone providing key intelligence.
bounty_title8082:
To support the investigation into Koiryu-kai-related violence and smuggling cases,
an additional reward has been established for anyone providing key leads.

des_ass_skill1: Thrusts with a carried eyebrow razor. The damage is clearly lacking.
des_ass_skill2: Swings an axe down with tremendous force. The move is simple, but hard to dodge.
des_ass_skill3: Charge, rush, then horizontal slash. This is the secret technique passed down by generations of mountain guardians.
des_ass_skill4: A devastating bear-hug kill that can easily snap a 50 cm wooden pillar.
des_ass_skill5: A Bajiquan move improved by Yusuke Kawashima. Exceptionally fierce!
des_ass_skill6: A secret technique RIKA mastered while training in China. She slams forward at full power, dealing devastating damage ahead.
des_ass_skill7: A simple baton swing with very low lethality.
des_ass_skill8: A police combat art that looks better than it performs.
des_ass_skill9: Strikes enemies with a riot shield. Requires great arm strength.
des_ass_skill10: Shocks enemies with a stun baton, with a chance to paralyze.
des_ass_skill11: A variation of Xingyiquan that approaches in a bird-like stance and jabs straight at both eyes.
des_ass_skill12: An ancient martial art. Kill every enemy you meet!
des_ass_skill13: Bathed in golden fighting aura, she lands a heavy blow while the enemy is distracted.
401_desc:
A cute girl who is a little strong *^_^*
Below immortals, I am invincible. Above immortals, I trade one for one.
102_desc:
Fujimoto is a first-year rookie officer at Ashiya Koban.
Born in a big city, he is bright, cheerful, positive, and hardworking. Great husband material!
103_desc:
A policewoman with three years of front-line experience.
Her work style matches her appearance: capable and rigorous. As for what is inside, perhaps she has her own little secrets.
104_desc:
He once held a high position in the Kansai police force. Problems in his private life ruined his career.
Now he idles around Ashiya Koban, handling trivial cases.
804_desc:
Currently studying education at Ashiya University.
She does not come from a wealthy family, but she has always spent money freely. Lately, she seems short on cash.
808_desc:
A member of the Koiryu-kai underworld group, skilled and quick-witted.
He is currently helping [Yusuke Kawashima] open smuggling routes between the Chubu and Hokuriku regions.
811_desc:
The 33rd-generation guardian of Mount Raimei.
She treats people sincerely and has a bold personality. Only her clan knows what they are truly guarding.
801_desc:
Born in Oita Prefecture to farming parents. She met her husband, Shigeru Kumamoto, through an arranged meeting.
Since her school days, her excessively provocative body has often drawn sexual harassment, which troubles her deeply.
802_desc:
He was once a chef, until a chance event led him into smuggling rare ingredients.
He is extremely possessive, yet also has a fetish for exposing and humiliating his own wife, which makes him seem a little mentally split.
803_desc: She was once the top hostess at a famous Ginza nightclub in Tokyo. Later, a mysterious wealthy patron kept her as his mistress. Though she lacks nothing materially, her patron visits her bed less and less, leaving Mika's carnal desires with nowhere to go.
805_desc: A low-profile hidden millionaire. No one knows how many assets this old lady has. In her youth, she lived in many countries and gained rich life experience. She now lives near Mount Rokko in Ashiya to treat her granddaughter's illness.
806_desc:
A mysterious, cool girl living with her grandmother in Ashiya's wealthy district to recover her health.
Rei owns a mysterious treasure chest that produces unexpected items every day.
ending1:
The sense of justice and passion she once had completely collapsed the moment she was dismissed, replaced by uncontrollable physical craving.

She began drifting through the sex industry: first as a hostess at nightclubs, wearing revealing dresses, drinking, chatting, flirting with customers, and earning tips.

Later, she entered a soapland bathhouse, using her body to provide customers with "full-service" care, touched and toyed with by strangers again and again in the bathroom.
ending1_1:
In the end, she took to standing on street corners for compensated dating, waiting late at night in a miniskirt and high heels for the next customer.

Money came fast and disappeared just as fast. She learned to cover the bags under her eyes with makeup, to hide exhaustion behind a fake smile, and to say the dirtiest things beneath customers just to earn a little more.

The police badge she once wore is now locked deep inside a drawer, never opened again.
ending2:
Although she felt lost for a while after being dismissed, Hikaru Ayukawa soon picked herself back up and poured all her passion into a new hobby - fishing.

Every morning or late at night, she carried her rod, bait, and folding chair to rivers, lakes, and the sea near the city. At first it was only to ease the emptiness, but she unexpectedly discovered an astonishing talent: she could read currents and fish movements, choose the right bait, control her float, and patiently wait until even the most stubborn fish bit.
ending2_1:
In just a few months, she caught countless rare fish:

Wild black sea bream from Lake Biwa
Giant carp from the Kamo River
Rare grouper from the Seto Inland Sea
Even the legendary "golden trout"...
She became somewhat famous in fishing circles, with users calling her "Ayukawa the Fish Maniac" or "the ex-cop angler."

She posted photos of her catches online, earning tips and sponsorships, making more than she would from part-time work. Sometimes, she gave extra fish to nearby elders or children, smiling with a simple happiness she had not shown in a long time.
ending3:
The former police rookie is now an ordinary worker in society.

She moves between chain restaurants, convenience stores, and small factories, working as a server, cashier, and stock handler... every day wearing cheap uniforms and repeating mechanical tasks like taking orders, handling registers, mopping floors, and unloading goods.

Her wages barely cover rent and living expenses. Sometimes, after overtime runs late into the night, she comes home and collapses into bed.
ending3_1:
Her old sense of justice and passion gradually wears away under endless overtime and cold looks from customers.

She no longer wears a police uniform or patrols the streets. Only sometimes, when passing by a koban, she stops and stares blankly at that familiar door.
ending4:
At the end of her thirty-day internship, Hikaru Ayukawa shocked the entire Ashiya Police Station with an almost "insane" number of cases handled and arrests made.

She patrolled, tailed suspects, set up operations, and conducted raids almost without sleeping. Theft, fights, fraud, and even several long-wanted repeat offenders in her jurisdiction were all brought in by her iron will and sharp insight.

In his final evaluation report, Chief Takakura wrote: "The number of cases handled is astonishing, arrest efficiency is extremely high, and her sense of justice is strong. She acts decisively and fearlessly. During her internship, she has already demonstrated police ability and professional ethics far beyond a rookie."
ending4_1:
Her application for regular appointment was submitted directly to the Metropolitan Police Department with a "Special Excellence, Exceptional Recommendation" rating, along with a handwritten recommendation from the chief: "This officer has the potential to become an outstanding detective. I recommend priority assignment to front-line criminal investigation."

Clean in private life and almost severe in self-discipline, she was not shaken by any temptation or pressure. Through her actions, she proved that justice needs no compromise, and a police officer should never make deals.
ending5:
At the end of her thirty-day internship, Hikaru Ayukawa stood out through an astonishing number of cases handled and highly efficient performance.

Every day, she rushed through the streets and alleys of her jurisdiction, arresting criminals and handling sudden incidents... almost never taking a day off.

In his final evaluation report, Chief Takakura wrote: "She handles cases proactively, reacts quickly, has strong public support, and possesses an exceptional sense of responsibility and execution. A rare practical talent among rookies."

Her application for regular appointment passed quickly with an "Excellent" rating, and a handwritten recommendation from the chief was sent straight to the Metropolitan Police Department's personnel division.
ending5_1:
Her name began spreading in small circles inside the Metropolitan Police Department: "There is a rookie policewoman... sharp on cases, solved over a hundred in just a month."

"I heard she never complains even on overnight patrols. The residents in her district like her too."

This pure record of achievement has already opened a path to promotion for her - in the future, she may well be transferred to the detective division or an even more central post.
ending6:
When the thirty-day internship ended, Hikaru Ayukawa had not only completed all visible police duties perfectly, but had also shown another astonishing "ability" in private.

She cleverly turned the advantages of her female body into workplace resources: at key moments, she used gentle companionship, comfort, and even more intimate "assistance" to gain exceptional favor and care from superiors, coworkers, and even residents in the district.
ending6_1:
Troublesome mediations, intelligence gathering, smoothing over relationships... under her intentional or unintentional "contributions," they often became unusually easy.

Her application for regular appointment quickly passed with a "Special Excellence" rating, even including a recommendation personally signed by the chief. That recommendation went directly to the upper levels of the Metropolitan Police Department, paving the way for her future promotion.

On the surface, she remains that innocent, hardworking rookie policewoman. Privately, she has already learned to walk smoothly between justice and desire.
ending7:
Over the course of thirty full days of internship, Hikaru Ayukawa proved through her actions that she is fully suited to becoming a qualified police officer.

Although her results were not especially dazzling, her punctual daily patrols, careful records, and every small act of protecting citizens were seen by both coworkers and superiors.
ending7_1: That steadiness and persistence are already rare among rookies. Her regular appointment application has been personally reviewed and signed by Chief Takakura and submitted for approval. Once the official notice comes down, Hikaru Ayukawa will formally become a member of Ashiya Koban!
